message:
Command `
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Wrapper.v: how does it instantiate compute_ss? ==="
grep -n "u_core\|compute_ss\|trst_n\|tck\|tdi\|tdo\|tms" \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -60

echo ""
echo "=== compute_ss.v: module header / port list ==="
# Get module declaration and ports
awk '/^module mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss/,/^\);/' \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v" | head -80

echo ""
echo "=== compute_ss: any debug/trst/jtag ports? ==="
grep -in "trst\|jtag\|tck\|tdi\|tdo\|tms\|swdio\|swdclk\|swd" \
  "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v" | head -20
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments: {"query": "Port mismatch between wrapper and compute_ss: wrapper references trst_n port that doesn't exist in compute_ss module. How to resolve RTL port mismatch in nc_chipgen generated files?"}
function.name: query_ragflow

function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Wrapper.v: how does it instantiate compute_ss? ===
2:// Connects mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss (compute_ss) to padframe core-facing signals
2361:mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss u_core (
2364:    .tck(1'b0),
2365:    .tms(1'b0),
2366:    .tdi(1'b0),
2367:    .trst_n(1'b0),

=== compute_ss.v: module header / port list ===
module mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset_n,
    input wire swclk,
    input wire swdi,
    output wire swdo,
    output wire swdo_en,
    output wire qspi_sck,
    output wire qspi_ce_n,
    input wire [3:0] qspi_din,
    output wire [3:0] qspi_dout,
    output wire [3:0] qspi_douten,
    output wire [11:0] clk_rst_pwr_paddr,
    output wire        clk_rst_pwr_psel,
    output wire        clk_rst_pwr_penable,
    output wire        clk_rst_pwr_pwrite,
    output wire [31:0] clk_rst_pwr_pwdata,
    input  wire [31:0] clk_rst_pwr_prdata,
    input  wire        clk_rst_pwr_pready,
    input  wire        clk_rst_pwr_pslverr,
    output wire [11:0] io_cfg_ss_paddr,
    output wire        io_cfg_ss_psel,
    output wire        io_cfg_ss_penable,
    output wire        io_cfg_ss_pwrite,
    output wire [31:0] io_cfg_ss_pwdata,
    input  wire [31:0] io_cfg_ss_prdata,
    input  wire        io_cfg_ss_pready,
    input  wire        io_cfg_ss_pslverr,
    input wire [15:0] gpioa_in,
    output wire [15:0] gpioa_out,
    output wire [15:0] gpioa_oe,
    input wire [15:0] gpiob_in,
    output wire [15:0] gpiob_out,
    output wire [15:0] gpiob_oe,
    input wire [15:0] gpioc_in,
    output wire [15:0] gpioc_out,
    output wire [15:0] gpioc_oe,
    output wire halted
);

=== compute_ss: any debug/trst/jtag ports? ===
14:// CPU type: hazard3_2port_swd
21:    input wire swdi,
22:    output wire swdo,
23:    output wire swdo_en,
289:    ) u_h3_swd_dp (
292:        .swdi        (swdi),
293:        .swdo        (swdo),
294:        .swdo_en     (swdo_en),
319:    ) u_h3_swd_ap (
2686:    // Non-JTAG CPU configuration
